title: jasminum didymum subsp. racemosum
intro: Jasminum didymum subsp. racemosum, also known as the star jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Jasminum didymum subsp. racemosum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
